description: 11x builds AI digital workers that automate outbound prospecting end to end, from finding and qualifying leads to multichannel engagement and follow-ups.
overview: 11x offers AI 'digital workers' that run outbound for sales and RevOps teams, handling lead research, qualification, and multichannel engagement around the clock.
what_is: 11x is an AI outbound platform built around digital workers that take on the prospecting process. They identify and qualify leads and engage them across channels, so a team can keep pipeline activity running without adding headcount.

It is strongest at high-volume lead generation, qualification, and multichannel engagement, booking qualified meetings faster. The agents work continuously and adapt over time, which suits teams that want to scale outreach volume.

11x connects to CRMs, communication channels, and data sources to personalize outreach and automate follow-ups. It is focused on volume-based engagement and pipeline building rather than sales strategy or relationship management.
